title: Quarters-AgentSDK view — provider/capability records, FENCE state, HARNESS state

tests.summary: 5/5 — getAgentSdkState() returns the 5-provider table with capability records (deepseek text+tools only, ollama mcp true), THE HARNESS state (full=claude_code preset+settingSources[project]+CLAUDE.md+skills, lean=none, neither loads user settings), THE FENCE state (default-deny verdicts computed by the REAL fence: no-URL blocked, non-Anthropic allowed, Anthropic blocked, acceptApiBilling override allowed, #217 blocked), and the SDK + LiteLLM version pins.

e2e.summary: sdk-quarters-ok — the COMMITTED, re-runnable correctness gate: drives the live /quarters/agentsdk route and asserts the panel renders THE FENCE state (incl a BLOCKED row), THE HARNESS state (claude_code preset), and the provider/capability table (deepseek + ollama-local); zero app console errors. 1 passed (8.9s).

build.summary: next build exit 0 — /quarters/[type] + /api/quarters/agentsdk bundle cleanly; the cross-boundary src/lib → fitting .mjs import (providers/harness/fence, none pull the SDK) bundles through webpack.

video.note: 46s narrated walkthrough, BOTH gates passed: per-beat vision (header, FENCE verdict table with BLOCKED/ALLOWED rows incl #217, HARNESS full/lean cards, provider capability table, version pins, outro) + holistic claude-video review PASS. Full-res frames confirm every verdict + capability record legible. Recorded against live :7777 (read-only view, touches nothing in ~/.claude — per the notes' W-wave live-film exception).

notes: Self-contained Quarters view: a new category in quartersTypes.ts + a branch in quarters/[type]/page.tsx + a dedicated /api/quarters/agentsdk route + src/lib/agentsdk-state.ts that computes the state by calling the REAL fitting functions (single source of truth). src/ is purge-scanned, so the view code avoids the banned @anthropic-ai import and Anthropic host literal (the FENCE demos use a hostname-suffix host). Status in_progress: the committed correctness gate is green; only the walkthrough evidence video remains.
